title: The Battle for the Flame-Flame Fruit Begins
description: Pages 1–4 focus on the battle for the flame-flame fruit begins, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Don Chinjao, Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as the first Colosseum fighters clash while Luffy tries to hide his identity and new rivals like Cavendish, Burgess, and Bartolomeo stand out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: O!! What's up with that little guy !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He took down spartan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But how!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: He's the Star Gladiator of this Colosseum !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let's see... where should I go...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He... He must have just tripped over his own feet ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But he's embedded into the floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You! For causing this disturbance ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: PLEASE LEAVE IMMEDIATELY!! YOU'RE DIS- QUALIFIED!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ehh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We don't stand for hooligans who incite violence before the matches have even started

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WaH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey, hey

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Come off it, ya dumbass!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The one who started it was that big oaf over there!! If anyone's dis- qualified it should be him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don Chinao

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Xai

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Although he's already out cold

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Hanokuni Gang: Chinjao Family

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whoa!! It's Xai and Boo from Hanokuni!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Even looks like Don Chinjao showed up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: THEY'RE ALREADY PRACTICALLY LEGENDS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thanks for that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No need for thanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Kahkah

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Seriously... no need for to thank us in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Did this guy really just thank us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Thanking us is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Take it back, you scum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You don't gotta turn down his thanks that much, bro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wahhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: sorry about this. He gets excited a bit too easily

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't you ever thank us again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fuck you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All sorts of people here, huh

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: You... Scheming something with strong guys in the same block!? DAGAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: 01 01 BIG names from every country are showing up, one after the other... It must be the case that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: They're scrambling to obtain the devil fruit and raise the status of their homelands!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: These fights are on an individual basis!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: assassins from a neighboring country: 'Flurlk 'Brother's

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Even if you try something like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Funk Brothers

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Only one winner will walk away from each block...!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Conspiring to bribe your way through the event? 01!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: younger brother Bobby Funk older brother Kerry Funk

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: HOW NAVE!!! You two were also ordered here by your country, no?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A country in possession of the "mera Mera No mi" would, even with all its other weapons aside...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Be able to achieve UN- parallel advantage in both diplomacy and war alike!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: PRODENSE KINGDOM MILITARY STRATEGIST: �

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: king of the prudense kingdom, "the fighting king;" Elizabetho: the Second

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Take a look around....!! What a lineup!!!

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on the battle for the flame-flame fruit begins, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
